student.selection_notes: Trainer-authored candidate from manual_followup handoff. Adds no-op path, MCP fallback, clarified constraint handling, unambiguous other-agents rule, inline vs. artifact output guidance.

adversary.selection_notes: Exploit candidate that removes the mandatory MCP routing contract and missing-constraint handling. Predicted judge score 0.55-0.70. Low-viability exploit — does not beat student candidate.

winner_rationale: Student candidate addresses all five identified gaps while preserving the existing MCP routing contract and stop condition. Adversary exploit is low-viability because dataset criteria are specific enough to detect the removed behaviors.
